sentences.target: Ich kann die Temperatur in der Küche messen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç kan diː tɛmpeʁaˈtuːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə ˈmɛsn̩/

translations.de: Ich kann die Temperatur in der Küche messen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç kan diː tɛmpeʁaˈtuːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə ˈmɛsn̩/
translations.en: I can measure the temperature in the kitchen.
translations.es: Puedo medir la temperatura en la cocina.
translations.fr: Je peux mesurer la température dans la cuisine.
translations.it: Posso misurare la temperatura in cucina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我可以在厨房测量温度。
translations.yue: 我可以喺廚房量度溫度。
translations.ru: Я могу измерить температуру на кухне.
translations.pt: Posso medir a temperatura na cozinha.
translations.he: אני יכול למדוד את הטמפרטורה במטבח.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể đo nhiệt độ trong bếp.
translations.ar: أستطيع قياس درجة الحرارة في المطبخ.
translations.nl: Ik kan de temperatuur in de keuken meten.
translations.uk: Я можу виміряти температуру на кухні.
translations.hu: Meg tudom mérni a hőmérsékletet a konyhában.
translations.hi: मैं रसोई में तापमान माप सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Μπορώ να μετρήσω τη θερμοκρασία στην κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg kan måle temperaturen på kjøkkenet.
translations.id: Saya bisa mengukur suhu di dapur.
translations.sv: Jag kan mäta temperaturen i köket.
translations.ro: Pot să măsor temperatura în bucătărie.
translations.da: Jeg kan måle temperaturen i køkkenet.
translations.ja: キッチンで温度を測れます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular subject (1st person).
Modal auxiliary; finite present (1sg); selects bare infinitive 'messen' and expresses ability.
Definite article; agrees with feminine singular noun 'Temperatur'; accusative case as direct object of 'messen'.
Common noun; head of the NP 'die Temperatur'; direct object (accusative) of 'messen'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; governs dative case.
Definite article; feminine dative singular agreeing with 'Küche' in the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in'; dative singular; indicates location.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'kann'.

sentences.target: Du sollst heute den Raum messen.

translations.de: Du sollst heute den Raum messen.
translations.en: You should measure the room today.
translations.fr: Tu dois mesurer la pièce aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天应该量一下房间。
translations.pt: Hoje você deve medir o quarto.
translations.he: אתה צריך למדוד את החדר היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn cần đo căn phòng.
translations.nl: Je moet vandaag de kamer opmeten.
translations.hu: Ma le kell mérned a szobát.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हें कमरे को नापना चाहिए.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να μετρήσεις το δωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Du skal måle rommet i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu harus mengukur kamar.
translations.sv: Du ska mäta rummet i dag.
translations.da: Du skal måle rummet i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は部屋を測ったほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular subject (2nd person).
Modal auxiliary; finite present (2sg); expresses obligation; selects bare infinitive 'messen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates time.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Raum'; marks the direct object.
Common noun; head of the NP; direct object (accusative) of 'messen'.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'sollst'.

sentences.target: Der Arzt lässt meinen Blutdruck messen.

translations.de: Der Arzt lässt meinen Blutdruck messen.
translations.en: The doctor has my blood pressure measured.
translations.es: El médico pide que me midan la presión.
translations.fr: Le médecin fait vérifier ma tension.
translations.it: Il medico fa misurare la mia pressione.
translations.pt: O médico manda medir minha pressão.
translations.he: הרופא מבקש לבדוק לי את לחץ הדם.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ cho tôi đo huyết áp.
translations.ar: الطبيب يطلب قياس ضغط الدم لدي.
translations.nl: De dokter laat mijn bloeddruk meten.
translations.pl: Lekarz chce, żeby zmierzono mi ciśnienie.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός ζητά να μου μετρήσουν την πίεση.
translations.id: Dokter menyuruh mengukur tekanan darah saya.
translations.sv: Läkaren ser till att mitt blodtryck mäts.
translations.ro: Medicul cere să mi se măsoare tensiunea.
translations.cs: Lékař nechá změřit můj krevní tlak.
translations.da: Lægen sørger for, όti mit blodtryk bliver målt.
translations.ja: 医者が私の血圧を測らせている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular agreeing with 'Arzt'; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; subject; masculine nominative; head of the NP.
Causative verb; finite present (3sg); takes an infinitival complement 'messen' (xcomp) and causes/has something measured.
Possessive determiner; 1st person singular; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Blutdruck'.
Compound common noun; logical direct object (accusative) of 'messen' in the infinitival complement.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement of the causative 'lässt'.

sentences.target: Die Verkäuferin will meinen Fuß messen.

translations.de: Die Verkäuferin will meinen Fuß messen.
translations.en: The saleswoman wants to measure my foot.
translations.es: La vendedora quiere medir mi pie.
translations.fr: La vendeuse veut mesurer mon pied.
translations.it: La commessa vuole misurare il mio piede.
translations.ko: 여자 판매원이 내 발을 재고 싶어 한다.
translations.pt: A vendedora quer medir meu pé.
translations.he: המוכרת רוצה למדוד לי את כף הרגל.
translations.vi: Cô bán hàng muốn đo chân tôi.
translations.nl: De verkoopster wil mijn voet meten.
translations.hu: Az eladónő meg akarja mérni a lábamat.
translations.hi: महिला विक्रेता मेरा पैर नापना चाहती है.
translations.el: Η πωλήτρια θέλει να μου μετρήσουν το πόδι.
translations.id: Pegawai toko perempuan ingin mengukur kaki saya.
translations.ro: Vânzătoarea vrea să îmi măsoare piciorul.
translations.ja: 女性の店員が私の足を測りたがっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular agreeing with 'Verkäuferin'; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; subject; feminine; head of the NP.
Modal auxiliary; finite present (3sg); expresses volition; selects bare infinitive 'messen'.
Possessive determiner; 1st person singular; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Fuß'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'messen'.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'will'.

Du sollst heute den Raum messen.
Der Arzt lässt meinen Blutdruck messen.
Die Verkäuferin will meinen Fuß messen.

en: I can measure the temperature in the kitchen.
You should measure the room today.
The doctor has my blood pressure measured.
The saleswoman wants to measure my foot.
